body:
Adds per-tenant usage metering and the monthly billing summary used by the invoicing job.

- new `billing` module: usage totals, dashboard paging + latency, per-kind summary in cents
- new background `SummaryShipper` that posts summaries to the internal billing API
- storage: tenant event query + best-effort offline flush
- auth: bearer-token check for the metering endpoints

Closes #17
title: feat: usage metering and monthly billing summary
